matrix_page_subtitle: Route each AI capability to a provider per account. The primary runs first; backups take over when it fails.
matrix_load_error: The provider matrix could not be loaded. Please try again.
matrix_empty_accounts: No active accounts yet. Add an account before assigning providers.
matrix_simplified_overwrite: Simplified view applies one shared configuration — saving a cell overwrites all account-specific settings.
matrix_cell_model_hint: Leave the model empty to use the provider's default.
matrix_save_failed: Saving the matrix failed. Please try again.
matrix_no_providers_hint: No providers configured yet. Add one under AI Providers first.
matrix_error_duplicate_provider: A backup must use a different provider than the primary.
matrix_error_max_backups: At most two backups are allowed.
matrix_batch_switch_risk_local: Switch All Risk Checks to Local
matrix_batch_nothing_to_copy: Nothing to copy yet — assign that cell first.
matrix_warning_small_model: Summaries and role audits need strong reasoning; this local model looks smaller than 7B and may underperform.
matrix_warning_expensive_e4: Risk checks run on every inbound mail; a cloud model here can add significant cost.
matrix_warning_cloud_style: Style learning sends excerpts of your mail history to a cloud endpoint; consider a local model.
matrix_stats_empty: Usage statistics will appear here once AI calls have been recorded.
